memories.content:
## ClawBridge Phase 1 packaged with automation + detailed docs

Implemented packaged Phase 1 CLI at `skills/clawbridge/bin/clawbridge.js` with command:
- `clawbridge extract-discord-thread`

Capabilities:
- automatic extraction from source thread
- automatic generation of short/full/bootstrap artifacts
- automatic destination forum thread creation and posting
- optional ClawText promotion via `--ingest`
- agent-led manual override flags for objective/established/open/next context

Documentation added for agent/operator success:
- `skills/clawbridge/START_HERE.md`
- `skills/clawbridge/QUICKSTART.md`
- `skills/clawbridge/INTEGRATION.md`
- updated `README.md` and `SKILL.md`

Validation run succeeded, creating thread:
- `1481146857693511822`
- `https://discord.com/channels/1474997926919929927/1475021817168134144/1481146857693511822`

## ClawBridge official thread designated

Channel `1481146857693511822` designated as the official ClawBridge thread. Previous work referenced: `--title "ClawBridge Extract — Test" --mode dual --ingest` command that was the last left-off point.

## ClawBridge execution layer naming candidates

User requested humorous naming alternatives to "ClawXecution" for the execution function aspect of the big project. Generated candidates with rankings:
- **ClawForce** (execution muscle/power, serious-funny, immediate recognition)
- **ClawGrip** (control flow, alliteration, tangible feel)
- **ClawMaker** (builds on existing energy, action-oriented)
- **ClawDo** (peak ridiculousness, memetic stupidity-fun)
- **ClawStrike**, **ClawActuate**, **ClawGrind**, **ClawCatch**, **ClawWield** (other variants)

User decision pending on which direction aligns with project vibe.
